name: Oranges in Red Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry red wine, water, sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and lemon slices in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes.
3. Peel the oranges and discard the skins and fibrous membranes.
4. Section the oranges and drop the sections into the hot syrup.
5. Remove the white part of the orange skin and cut it into very fine julienne strips.
6. Sprinkle the strips over the orange sections in the red wine mixture.
7. Chill the dish before serving in chilled crystal compote dishes.
